sipantichijk@penguin:~/church_project/SoC$ grep -i sapphire ~/church_project/SoC/church_soc_cm.xml | head -5
grep -c "INIT_0" ~/church_project/SoC/work_syn/church_soc_cm.map.v 2>/dev/null || \
  grep -c "INIT_0" ~/church_project/SoC/outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v 2>/dev/null
grep -m1 "INIT_0" $(ls ~/church_project/SoC/outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v ~/church_project/SoC/work_syn/church_soc_cm.map.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)
<efx:project xmlns:efx="http://www.efinixinc.com/enf_proj" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" name="church_soc_cm" description="Church Machine Sapphire SoC plus Church Machine combined bitstream for Ti60F225" last_change="1780867644" sw_version="2026.1.132" last_run_state="pass" last_run_flow="syn" config_result_in_sync="sync" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.efinixinc.com/enf_proj enf_proj.xsd" design_ood="sync" place_ood="sync" route_ood="sync">
        <efx:design_file name="sapphire.v" version="default" library="default" />
        <efx:design_file name="sapphire_define.vh" version="default" library="default" />
